response.justification: Bogdan meets the raw years-of-experience bar (~17 years) and brings genuine breadth across stacks and domains, including founding an open-source geo-data platform and recent work on MCP/agentic tooling at re:cinq. However, the role is a director-level AI strategy IC position requiring deep, recognized AI expertise and a track record of advising customers on cloud and AI adoption — neither of which is present. The AI work is confined to roughly two months at the current employer, there is no cloud platform strategy background, and the career arc is that of a senior/staff individual contributor rather than a technical thought leader operating at the scope the role demands.
strengths: 15+ years of polyglot, full-stack engineering experience across web, embedded, mobile, and infrastructure
Entrepreneurial track record: founded and maintains GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform used in production
Recent direct exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, signaling active orientation toward the AI space
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and very recent (~2 months), with no demonstrated AI-powered products or recognized standing in the field
No cloud platform strategy experience; cloud use is limited to AWS CDK as a toolchain dependency, not architecture or advisory work
Career seniority and scope do not match a director-level strategic IC role; no evidence of customer/partner advisory, internal evangelism, or cross-org technical leadership

key_factors.factor: Broad engineering tenure and builder mindset
